# Pull Request

## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.
List any new dependencies required for this change.

Fixes # (issue)

---

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] CI / workflow update

---

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have added comments in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] Documentation has been updated where necessary
- [ ] No new warnings or errors are introduced
- [ ] Changes have been tested on Termux (Android)
- [ ] A CHANGELOG.md entry has been added (if feature/fix)

---

## Testing

Describe how to test this change:

```bash
tdoc scan
tdoc fix --auto
```

---

## Additional Notes

Add any other context, screenshots, or log output here.
